assignation-avatar.description: Avatar component that displays user assignment status Renders different states based on the number of assigned users: - No users: UnassignedAvatar (gray dashed circle with user icon) - 1 user: SingleAvatar (colored circle with initials) - 2 users: DualAvatar (two overlapping colored circles with initials) - 3+ users: CountAvatar (first user avatar + count circle)

reactDocgen.description:
Avatar component that displays user assignment status

Renders different states based on the number of assigned users:
- No users: UnassignedAvatar (gray dashed circle with user icon)
- 1 user: SingleAvatar (colored circle with initials)
- 2 users: DualAvatar (two overlapping colored circles with initials)
- 3+ users: CountAvatar (first user avatar + count circle)

stories.name: Default
Async Search

debounceDelay.description: Debounce time for async search. Only work with `onSearch`.

triggerSearchOnFocus.description:
Only work with `onSearch` prop. Trigger search when `onFocus`.
For example, when user click on the input, it will trigger the search to get initial options.

onSearchSync.description:
sync search. This search will not showing loadingIndicator.
The rest props are the same as async search.
i.e.: creatable, groupBy, delay.

maxSelected.description: Limit the maximum number of selected options.

onMaxSelected.description: When the number of selected options exceeds the limit, the onMaxSelected will be called.

hidePlaceholderWhenSelected.description: Hide the placeholder when there are options selected.

groupBy.description: Group the options base on provided key.

creatable.description: Allow user to create option when there is no option matched.

renderBadge.description: Render the badge for each option.

tables-data-table-cells.name: DataTable

stories.name: Base Cell
Application Feature Cell

tables-data-table-cells.import:
import { ConfigProvider, DataTable } from "components";
import { MemoryRouter, Route, Routes } from "react-router-dom";

SEE:: If you needs to only display data in a table without interaction, user-preference or pagination, use DisplayTable instead
Storybook provide an example of all custom cell
ISSUE:: Because headerGroups, we can't use performance resizing since we don't want a static table total size
For full-width table, 'table-fixed` must be used Added in `<Table />` shadcn component
DESCRIPTION:: `columns` define the mapping between the column and the cell component
`columnSettings` (saved by user) and defaultColumnSettings manage order, visibility, fixed status of each column
add a row selection checkbox for each row
add a row selection checkbox for each row
add a `RowExpandCell`, expand a custom subcomponent
enable groupBy for a columns. Accessor must have an id. DropdownMenuItem label's is created with defaultColumnSettings
enable column group. Use columnHelper.group

pagination prop manage the pagination mode and state For client side pagination, set type to 'locale' and provide state if override is needed For server side pagination, set type to 'server' and provide state and onPaginationChange handler

additional fields are managed by the table to be able to request extra data from server based on the column visibility. In defaultColumnSettings, you can enter the IDs of the relevant columns in additionalFields.
EXAMPLE:: [ columnHelper.accessor((row) => row.hgvsg, { id: "hgvsg", cell: (info) => info.getValue(), header: "Variant", size: 100, minSize: 50, }) ]
[{ "key": "{column.id}", "index": 16, "visible": {boolean}, "fixed": {boolean}, }]
[{ id: "pinRow", cell: PinRowCell, size: 52, enableResizing: false, enablePinning: false, }]

[{ id: "rowSelection", header: (header: HeaderContext<any, Occurrence>) => <RowSelectionHeader table={header.table} />, cell: info => <RowSelectionCell row={info.row} />, size: 48, maxSize: 48, enableResizing: false, enablePinning: false, }]
[{ id: "rowExpand", cell: RowExpandCell size: 48, enableResizing: false, enablePinning: false, }]
[{ columnHelper.accessor('status', { id: "status", header: 'Status', getGroupingValue: row => `Group By ${row.status}`, enableGrouping: true, }), }]*
columnHelper.group({ id: 'group', columns: [ // Row 1 columnHelper.accessor(row => row.value, { ... }), ], }), }]
{type: 'server',state: {pageIndex: 0,pageSize: 10,},onPaginationChange: (newPagination) => { ... },}
{additionalFields: ['field1', 'field2'],}

tables-data-table-cells.description: Data-Table Should be used for complex and interactive table.

tables-data-table-filters.import:
import { BrowserRouter } from "react-router-dom";
import { ConfigProvider, DataTable, TableFilters } from "components";

SEE:: If you needs to only display data in a table without interaction, user-preference or pagination, use DisplayTable instead
Storybook provide an example of all custom cell
ISSUE:: Because headerGroups, we can't use performance resizing since we don't want a static table total size
For full-width table, 'table-fixed` must be used Added in `<Table />` shadcn component
DESCRIPTION:: `columns` define the mapping between the column and the cell component
`columnSettings` (saved by user) and defaultColumnSettings manage order, visibility, fixed status of each column
add a row selection checkbox for each row
add a row selection checkbox for each row
add a `RowExpandCell`, expand a custom subcomponent
enable groupBy for a columns. Accessor must have an id. DropdownMenuItem label's is created with defaultColumnSettings
enable column group. Use columnHelper.group

pagination prop manage the pagination mode and state For client side pagination, set type to 'locale' and provide state if override is needed For server side pagination, set type to 'server' and provide state and onPaginationChange handler

additional fields are managed by the table to be able to request extra data from server based on the column visibility. In defaultColumnSettings, you can enter the IDs of the relevant columns in additionalFields.
EXAMPLE:: [ columnHelper.accessor((row) => row.hgvsg, { id: "hgvsg", cell: (info) => info.getValue(), header: "Variant", size: 100, minSize: 50, }) ]
[{ "key": "{column.id}", "index": 16, "visible": {boolean}, "fixed": {boolean}, }]
[{ id: "pinRow", cell: PinRowCell, size: 52, enableResizing: false, enablePinning: false, }]

[{ id: "rowSelection", header: (header: HeaderContext<any, Occurrence>) => <RowSelectionHeader table={header.table} />, cell: info => <RowSelectionCell row={info.row} />, size: 48, maxSize: 48, enableResizing: false, enablePinning: false, }]
[{ id: "rowExpand", cell: RowExpandCell size: 48, enableResizing: false, enablePinning: false, }]
[{ columnHelper.accessor('status', { id: "status", header: 'Status', getGroupingValue: row => `Group By ${row.status}`, enableGrouping: true, }), }]*
columnHelper.group({ id: 'group', columns: [ // Row 1 columnHelper.accessor(row => row.value, { ... }), ], }), }]
{type: 'server',state: {pageIndex: 0,pageSize: 10,},onPaginationChange: (newPagination) => { ... },}
{additionalFields: ['field1', 'field2'],}

import { BrowserRouter } from "react-router-dom";

ISSUE:: Because headerGroups, we can't use performance resizing since we don't want a static table total size
For full-width table, 'table-fixed` must be used Added in `<Table />` shadcn component
DESCRIPTION:: `columns` define the mapping between the column and the cell component
`columnSettings` (saved by user) and defaultColumnSettings manage order, visibility, fixed status of each column
add a row selection checkbox for each row
add a row selection checkbox for each row
add a `RowExpandCell`, expand a custom subcomponent
enable groupBy for a columns. Accessor must have an id. DropdownMenuItem label's is created with defaultColumnSettings
enable column group. Use columnHelper.group

pagination prop manage the pagination mode and state For client side pagination, set type to 'locale' and provide state if override is needed For server side pagination, set type to 'server' and provide state and onPaginationChange handler

additional fields are managed by the table to be able to request extra data from server based on the column visibility. In defaultColumnSettings, you can enter the IDs of the relevant columns in additionalFields.
EXAMPLE:: [ columnHelper.accessor((row) => row.hgvsg, { id: "hgvsg", cell: (info) => info.getValue(), header: "Variant", size: 100, minSize: 50, }) ]
[{ "key": "{column.id}", "index": 16, "visible": {boolean}, "fixed": {boolean}, }]
[{ id: "pinRow", cell: PinRowCell, size: 52, enableResizing: false, enablePinning: false, }]

[{ id: "rowSelection", header: (header: HeaderContext<any, Occurrence>) => <RowSelectionHeader table={header.table} />, cell: info => <RowSelectionCell row={info.row} />, size: 48, maxSize: 48, enableResizing: false, enablePinning: false, }]
[{ id: "rowExpand", cell: RowExpandCell size: 48, enableResizing: false, enablePinning: false, }]
